creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Versions that are no longer supported (e.g. 12.4-STABLE) have older versions of make.
That older version of make does not yet support numerical sort modifiers.
So, the next part of the process fails.

PATCHLEVEL= ${PATCHES:On:[-1]}

So I will update from 12.4-STABLE to 14 or newer this time :)
